  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Importación de librerías necesarias\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import yfinance as yf\n",
        "from sklearn.linear_model import Ridge, Lasso, ElasticNet\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
        "from sklearn.model_selection import TimeSeriesSplit, cross_val_score\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "from datetime import datetime, timedelta\n",
        "import warnings\n",
        "warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')\n",
        "from google.colab import files\n",
        "import io"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "W0w7wy23rnqH"
      },
      "execution_count": 109,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "rm 'factors.xlsx'"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "G63kKQ1kuNoN"
      },
      "execution_count": 110,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Import Factor Dataset\n",
        "uploaded_data = files.upload()\n",
        "df = pd.read_excel(io.BytesIO(uploaded_data['factors.xlsx']))\n",
        "df['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['date'])\n",
        "df.set_index('date', inplace=True)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 73
        },
        "id": "VkAph3VmzXH_",
        "outputId": "c5f68366-1f66-4b42-dcbd-c698132d9b3b"
      },
      "execution_count": 111,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<IPython.core.display.HTML object>"
            ],
            "text/html": [
              "\n",
              "     <input type=\"file\" id=\"files-2961b6f6-95cc-4421-809b-3a76b0dc6c71\" name=\"files[]\" multiple disabled\n",
              "        style=\"border:none\" />\n",
              "     <output id=\"result-2961b6f6-95cc-4421-809b-3a76b0dc6c71\">\n",
              "      Upload widget is only available when the cell has been executed in the\n",
              "      current browser session. Please rerun this cell to enable.\n",
              "      </output>\n",
              "      <script>// Copyright 2017 Google LLC\n",
              "//\n",
              "// Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n",
              "// you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n",
              "// You may obtain a copy of the License at\n",
              "//\n",
              "//      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n",
              "//\n",
              "// Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n",
              "// distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n",
              "// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n",
              "// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n",
              "// limitations under the License.\n",
              "\n",
              "/**\n",
              " * @fileoverview Helpers for google.colab Python module.\n",
              " */\n",
              "(function(scope) {\n",
              "function span(text, styleAttributes = {}) {\n",
              "  const element = document.createElement('span');\n",
              "  element.textContent = text;\n",
              "  for (const key of Object.keys(styleAttributes)) {\n",
              "    element.style[key] = styleAttributes[key];\n",
              "  }\n",
              "  return element;\n",
              "}\n",
              "\n",
              "// Max number of bytes which will be uploaded at a time.\n",
              "const MAX_PAYLOAD_SIZE = 100 * 1024;\n",
              "\n",
              "function _uploadFiles(inputId, outputId) {\n",
              "  const steps = uploadFilesStep(inputId, outputId);\n",
              "  const outputElement = document.getElementById(outputId);\n",
              "  // Cache steps on the outputElement to make it available for the next call\n",
              "  // to uploadFilesContinue from Python.\n",
              "  outputElement.steps = steps;\n",
              "\n",
              "  return _uploadFilesContinue(outputId);\n",
              "}\n",
              "\n",
              "// This is roughly an async generator (not supported in the browser yet),\n",
              "// where there are multiple asynchronous steps and the Python side is going\n",
              "// to poll for completion of each step.\n",
              "// This uses a Promise to block the python side on completion of each step,\n",
              "// then passes the result of the previous step as the input to the next step.\n",
              "function _uploadFilesContinue(outputId) {\n",
              "  const outputElement = document.getElementById(outputId);\n",
              "  const steps = outputElement.steps;\n",
              "\n",
              "  const next = steps.next(outputElement.lastPromiseValue);\n",
              "  return Promise.resolve(next.value.promise).then((value) => {\n",
              "    // Cache the last promise value to make it available to the next\n",
              "    // step of the generator.\n",
              "    outputElement.lastPromiseValue = value;\n",
              "    return next.value.response;\n",
              "  });\n",
              "}\n",
              "\n",
              "/**\n",
              " * Generator function which is called between each async step of the upload\n",
              " * process.\n",
              " * @param {string} inputId Element ID of the input file picker element.\n",
              " * @param {string} outputId Element ID of the output display.\n",
              " * @return {!Iterable<!Object>} Iterable of next steps.\n",
              " */\n",
              "function* uploadFilesStep(inputId, outputId) {\n",
              "  const inputElement = document.getElementById(inputId);\n",
              "  inputElement.disabled = false;\n",
              "\n",
              "  const outputElement = document.getElementById(outputId);\n",
              "  outputElement.innerHTML = '';\n",
              "\n",
              "  const pickedPromise = new Promise((resolve) => {\n",
              "    inputElement.addEventListener('change', (e) => {\n",
              "      resolve(e.target.files);\n",
              "    });\n",
              "  });\n",
              "\n",
              "  const cancel = document.createElement('button');\n",
              "  inputElement.parentElement.appendChild(cancel);\n",
              "  cancel.textContent = 'Cancel upload';\n",
              "  const cancelPromise = new Promise((resolve) => {\n",
              "    cancel.onclick = () => {\n",
              "      resolve(null);\n",
              "    };\n",
              "  });\n",
              "\n",
              "  // Wait for the user to pick the files.\n",
              "  const files = yield {\n",
              "    promise: Promise.race([pickedPromise, cancelPromise]),\n",
              "    response: {\n",
              "      action: 'starting',\n",
              "    }\n",
              "  };\n",
              "\n",
              "  cancel.remove();\n",
              "\n",
              "  // Disable the input element since further picks are not allowed.\n",
              "  inputElement.disabled = true;\n",
              "\n",
              "  if (!files) {\n",
              "    return {\n",
              "      response: {\n",
              "        action: 'complete',\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    };\n",
              "  }\n",
              "\n",
              "  for (const file of files) {\n",
              "    const li = document.createElement('li');\n",
              "    li.append(span(file.name, {fontWeight: 'bold'}));\n",
              "    li.append(span(\n",
              "        `(${file.type || 'n/a'}) - ${file.size} bytes, ` +\n",
              "        `last modified: ${\n",
              "            file.lastModifiedDate ? file.lastModifiedDate.toLocaleDateString() :\n",
              "                                    'n/a'} - `));\n",
              "    const percent = span('0% done');\n",
              "    li.appendChild(percent);\n",
              "\n",
              "    outputElement.appendChild(li);\n",
              "\n",
              "    const fileDataPromise = new Promise((resolve) => {\n",
              "      const reader = new FileReader();\n",
              "      reader.onload = (e) => {\n",
              "        resolve(e.target.result);\n",
              "      };\n",
              "      reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);\n",
              "    });\n",
              "    // Wait for the data to be ready.\n",
              "    let fileData = yield {\n",
              "      promise: fileDataPromise,\n",
              "      response: {\n",
              "        action: 'continue',\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    };\n",
              "\n",
              "    // Use a chunked sending to avoid message size limits. See b/62115660.\n",
              "    let position = 0;\n",
              "    do {\n",
              "      const length = Math.min(fileData.byteLength - position, MAX_PAYLOAD_SIZE);\n",
              "      const chunk = new Uint8Array(fileData, position, length);\n",
              "      position += length;\n",
              "\n",
              "      const base64 = btoa(String.fromCharCode.apply(null, chunk));\n",
              "      yield {\n",
              "        response: {\n",
              "          action: 'append',\n",
              "          file: file.name,\n",
              "          data: base64,\n",
              "        },\n",
              "      };\n",
              "\n",
              "      let percentDone = fileData.byteLength === 0 ?\n",
              "          100 :\n",
              "          Math.round((position / fileData.byteLength) * 100);\n",
              "      percent.textContent = `${percentDone}% done`;\n",
              "\n",
              "    } while (position < fileData.byteLength);\n",
              "  }\n",
              "\n",
              "  // All done.\n",
              "  yield {\n",
              "    response: {\n",
              "      action: 'complete',\n",
              "    }\n",
              "  };\n",
              "}\n",
              "\n",
              "scope.google = scope.google || {};\n",
              "scope.google.colab = scope.google.colab || {};\n",
              "scope.google.colab._files = {\n",
              "  _uploadFiles,\n",
              "  _uploadFilesContinue,\n",
              "};\n",
              "})(self);\n",
              "</script> "
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Saving factors.xlsx to factors.xlsx\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "def obtener_datos(fecha_inicio='2010-01-01',\n",
        "                  fecha_fin='2022-12-31',\n",
        "                  data_factors=df,\n",
        "                  stock_ticker='GE'):\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    Descarga y prepara datos de factores y retornos\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    # Descarga de datos de S&P 500 como proxy de mercado\n",
        "    spy = yf.download('^GSPC', start=fecha_inicio, end=fecha_fin)\n",
        "    spy = spy['Close'].resample('M').last().pct_change() * 100\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Creamos factores sintéticos para el ejemplo\n",
        "    # (en la práctica estos vendrían de bases de datos como Kenneth French)\n",
        "    data = pd.DataFrame(index=spy.index)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Factores\n",
        "    df = data_factors.loc[fecha_inicio:fecha_fin]\n",
        "    data['SMB'] = df['SMB'].copy()\n",
        "    data['HML'] = df['HML'].copy()\n",
        "    data['MOM'] = df['MOM'].copy()\n",
        "    data['VOL'] = df['VOL'].copy()\n",
        "    data['MKT'] = spy.values.flatten() - df['rf'].copy()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Stock de interes\n",
        "    stock = yf.download(stock_ticker, start=fecha_inicio, end=fecha_fin)\n",
        "    stock = stock['Close'].resample('M').last().pct_change() * 100\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Variable objetivo (Excess_Return)\n",
        "    data['Excess_Return'] = stock.values.flatten() - df['rf'].copy()\n",
        "\n",
        "    return data.dropna()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "1TtbDRDvrp6R"
      },
      "execution_count": 143,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Función para calcular VIF\n",
        "def calcular_vif(X):\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    Calcula el Factor de Inflación de Varianza para cada variable\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    vif_dict = {}\n",
        "    for i in range(X.shape[1]):\n",
        "        y = X.iloc[:, i]\n",
        "        X_other = X.drop(X.columns[i], axis=1)\n",
        "        from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression\n",
        "        r2 = LinearRegression().fit(X_other, y).score(X_other, y)\n",
        "        vif = 1/(1-r2)\n",
        "        vif_dict[X.columns[i]] = vif\n",
        "    return pd.Series(vif_dict)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "lx6aSVY16d0H"
      },
      "execution_count": 145,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Función para selección de lambda mediante validación cruzada\n",
        "def seleccionar_lambda(X, y, modelo='ridge', n_splits=5):\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    Selecciona el mejor parámetro de regularización usando validación cruzada\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    # Definimos la grilla de lambdas\n",
        "    lambdas = np.logspace(-1.5, 1.5, 100)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Inicializamos arrays para almacenar resultados\n",
        "    cv_scores_mean = []\n",
        "    cv_scores_std = []\n",
        "\n",
        "    # TimeSeriesSplit para datos financieros\n",
        "    tscv = TimeSeriesSplit(n_splits=n_splits)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Para cada lambda, calculamos el error de validación cruzada\n",
        "    for lambda_ in lambdas:\n",
        "        if modelo == 'ridge':\n",
        "            model = Ridge(alpha=lambda_)\n",
        "        elif modelo == 'lasso':\n",
        "            model = Lasso(alpha=lambda_)\n",
        "        else:  # elastic net\n",
        "            model = ElasticNet(alpha=lambda_, l1_ratio=0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "        scores = cross_val_score(model, X, y, cv=tscv, scoring='neg_mean_squared_error')\n",
        "        cv_scores_mean.append(-scores.mean())\n",
        "        cv_scores_std.append(scores.std())\n",
        "\n",
        "    return lambdas, cv_scores_mean, cv_scores_std"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "ds5NbLst6dZ6"
      },
      "execution_count": 146,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 148,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "uAUP_OOF_RDf"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "# Función para visualizar resultados\n",
        "def visualizar_resultados(lambdas, cv_scores_mean, cv_scores_std, modelo):\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    Crea gráficos de los resultados de validación cruzada\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "    plt.semilogx(lambdas, cv_scores_mean)\n",
        "    plt.fill_between(lambdas,\n",
        "                    np.array(cv_scores_mean) - np.array(cv_scores_std),\n",
        "                    np.array(cv_scores_mean) + np.array(cv_scores_std),\n",
        "                    alpha=0.2)\n",
        "    plt.xlabel('λ')\n",
        "    plt.ylabel('Error CV')\n",
        "    plt.title(f'Error de Validación Cruzada vs. λ ({modelo})')\n",
        "    plt.grid(True)\n",
        "    plt.show()"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Función principal\n",
        "def main():\n",
        "    # 1. Obtener datos\n",
        "    print(\"Descargando y preparando datos...\")\n",
        "    data = obtener_datos()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 2. Preparar variables\n",
        "    X = data[['MKT', 'SMB', 'HML', 'MOM', 'VOL']]\n",
        "    y = data['Excess_Return']\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 3. Calcular y mostrar VIF\n",
        "    print(\"\\nFactores de Inflación de Varianza:\")\n",
        "    vif = calcular_vif(X)\n",
        "    print(vif)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 4. Estandarizar variables\n",
        "    scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "    X_scaled = pd.DataFrame(scaler.fit_transform(X), columns=X.columns, index=X.index)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 5. Seleccionar lambda para cada modelo\n",
        "    modelos = ['ridge', 'lasso', 'elastic_net']\n",
        "    for modelo in modelos:\n",
        "        print(f\"\\nSeleccionando λ para {modelo}...\")\n",
        "        lambdas, cv_scores_mean, cv_scores_std = seleccionar_lambda(X_scaled, y, modelo)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Visualizar resultados\n",
        "        visualizar_resultados(lambdas, cv_scores_mean, cv_scores_std, modelo)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Encontrar lambda óptimo\n",
        "        lambda_opt = lambdas[np.argmin(cv_scores_mean)]\n",
        "        print(f\"λ óptimo para {modelo}: {lambda_opt:.4f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Ajustar modelo final\n",
        "        if modelo == 'ridge':\n",
        "            final_model = Ridge(alpha=lambda_opt)\n",
        "        elif modelo == 'lasso':\n",
        "            final_model = Lasso(alpha=lambda_opt)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            final_model = ElasticNet(alpha=lambda_opt, l1_ratio=0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "        final_model.fit(X_scaled, y)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Mostrar coeficientes\n",
        "        coef_df = pd.DataFrame({\n",
        "            'Variable': X.columns,\n",
        "            'Coeficiente': final_model.coef_\n",
        "        })\n",
        "        print(\"\\nCoeficientes estimados:\")\n",
        "        print(coef_df)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Calcular R2\n",
        "        r2 = final_model.score(X_scaled, y)\n",
        "        print(f\"R2: {r2:.4f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Visualizar coeficientes\n",
        "        plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "        sns.barplot(x='Variable', y='Coeficiente', data=coef_df)\n",
        "        plt.title(f'Coeficientes del Modelo {modelo}')\n",
        "        plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "        plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "        plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "UxjHBU8W6v8p"
      },
      "execution_count": 149,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n",
        "    main()"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "def analisis_robustez(X, y, lambda_opt, modelo='ridge'):\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    Realiza análisis de robustez para diferentes períodos\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    # Definimos diferentes períodos\n",
        "    periodos = {\n",
        "        'Completo': (X.index[0], X.index[-1]),\n",
        "        'Pre-Covid': (X.index[0], '2019-12-31'),\n",
        "        'Post-Covid': ('2020-01-01', X.index[-1]),\n",
        "        'Crisis Financiera': ('2010-01-01', '2012-12-31')\n",
        "    }\n",
        "\n",
        "    resultados = {}\n",
        "    for nombre, (inicio, fin) in periodos.items():\n",
        "        mask = (X.index >= inicio) & (X.index <= fin)\n",
        "        X_periodo = X[mask]\n",
        "        y_periodo = y[mask]\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Estandarizar datos\n",
        "        scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "        X_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(X_periodo)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Ajustar modelo\n",
        "        if modelo == 'ridge':\n",
        "            model = Ridge(alpha=lambda_opt)\n",
        "        elif modelo == 'lasso':\n",
        "            model = Lasso(alpha=lambda_opt)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            model = ElasticNet(alpha=lambda_opt, l1_ratio=0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "        model.fit(X_scaled, y_periodo)\n",
        "        r2 = model.score(X_scaled, y_periodo)\n",
        "        resultados[nombre] = {\n",
        "            'R2': r2,\n",
        "            'Coeficientes': pd.Series(model.coef_, index=X.columns)\n",
        "        }\n",
        "\n",
        "    return resultados"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "5PbHL1h368Bg"
      },
      "execution_count": 153,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "def comparar_modelos(X, y, lambdas_opt):\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    Compara resultados entre Ridge, Lasso y Elastic Net\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    # Estandarizar datos\n",
        "    scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "    X_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(X)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Ajustar cada modelo\n",
        "    modelos = {\n",
        "        'Ridge': Ridge(alpha=lambdas_opt['ridge']),\n",
        "        'Lasso': Lasso(alpha=lambdas_opt['lasso']),\n",
        "        'Elastic Net': ElasticNet(alpha=lambdas_opt['elastic_net'], l1_ratio=0.5)\n",
        "    }\n",
        "\n",
        "    resultados = {}\n",
        "    for nombre, modelo in modelos.items():\n",
        "        modelo.fit(X_scaled, y)\n",
        "        resultados[nombre] = {\n",
        "            'R2': modelo.score(X_scaled, y),\n",
        "            'Coeficientes': pd.Series(modelo.coef_, index=X.columns)\n",
        "        }\n",
        "\n",
        "    return resultados\n",
        "\n",
        "# Añadir al main():\n",
        "    # 6. Análisis de robustez\n",
        "    print(\"\\nRealizando análisis de robustez...\")\n",
        "    robustez = analisis_robustez(X, y, lambda_opt)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Visualizar resultados de robustez\n",
        "    periodos = list(robustez.keys())\n",
        "    r2_values = [res['R2'] for res in robustez.values()]\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "    plt.bar(periodos, r2_values)\n",
        "    plt.title('R2 por Período')\n",
        "    plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 7. Comparación entre modelos\n",
        "    print(\"\\nComparando modelos...\")\n",
        "    lambdas_opt = {\n",
        "        'ridge': lambda_opt_ridge,\n",
        "        'lasso': lambda_opt_lasso,\n",
        "        'elastic_net': lambda_opt_elastic\n",
        "    }\n",
        "    comparacion = comparar_modelos(X, y, lambdas_opt)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Visualizar comparación\n",
        "    modelos = list(comparacion.keys())\n",
        "    r2_values = [res['R2'] for res in comparacion.values()]\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "    plt.bar(modelos, r2_values)\n",
        "    plt.title('Comparación de R2 entre Modelos')\n",
        "    plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "    plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "EArb19NT_Tq9"
      },
      "execution_count": 154,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "def main():\n",
        "    # 1. Obtener datos\n",
        "    print(\"Descargando y preparando datos...\")\n",
        "    data = obtener_datos()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 2. Preparar variables\n",
        "    X = data[['MKT', 'SMB', 'HML', 'MOM', 'VOL']]\n",
        "    y = data['Excess_Return']\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 3. Calcular y mostrar VIF\n",
        "    print(\"\\nFactores de Inflación de Varianza:\")\n",
        "    vif = calcular_vif(X)\n",
        "    print(vif)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 4. Estandarizar variables\n",
        "    scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "    X_scaled = pd.DataFrame(scaler.fit_transform(X), columns=X.columns, index=X.index)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 5. Diccionario para almacenar lambdas óptimos\n",
        "    lambdas_opt = {}\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 6. Seleccionar lambda para cada modelo\n",
        "    modelos = ['ridge', 'lasso', 'elastic_net']\n",
        "    for modelo in modelos:\n",
        "        print(f\"\\nSeleccionando λ para {modelo}...\")\n",
        "        lambdas, cv_scores_mean, cv_scores_std = seleccionar_lambda(X_scaled, y, modelo)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Visualizar resultados\n",
        "        visualizar_resultados(lambdas, cv_scores_mean, cv_scores_std, modelo)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Encontrar y almacenar lambda óptimo\n",
        "        lambda_opt = lambdas[np.argmin(cv_scores_mean)]\n",
        "        lambdas_opt[modelo] = lambda_opt\n",
        "        print(f\"λ óptimo para {modelo}: {lambda_opt:.4f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Ajustar modelo final\n",
        "        if modelo == 'ridge':\n",
        "            final_model = Ridge(alpha=lambda_opt)\n",
        "        elif modelo == 'lasso':\n",
        "            final_model = Lasso(alpha=lambda_opt)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            final_model = ElasticNet(alpha=lambda_opt, l1_ratio=0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "        final_model.fit(X_scaled, y)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Mostrar coeficientes\n",
        "        coef_df = pd.DataFrame({\n",
        "            'Variable': X.columns,\n",
        "            'Coeficiente': final_model.coef_\n",
        "        })\n",
        "        print(\"\\nCoeficientes estimados:\")\n",
        "        print(coef_df)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Calcular R2\n",
        "        r2 = final_model.score(X_scaled, y)\n",
        "        print(f\"R2: {r2:.4f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Visualizar coeficientes\n",
        "        plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "        sns.barplot(x='Variable', y='Coeficiente', data=coef_df)\n",
        "        plt.title(f'Coeficientes del Modelo {modelo}')\n",
        "        plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "        plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "        plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 7. Análisis de robustez\n",
        "    print(\"\\nRealizando análisis de robustez...\")\n",
        "    # Realizamos el análisis de robustez para cada modelo\n",
        "    for modelo in modelos:\n",
        "        print(f\"\\nAnálisis de robustez para {modelo}:\")\n",
        "        robustez = analisis_robustez(X, y, lambdas_opt[modelo], modelo)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Visualizar resultados de robustez\n",
        "        periodos = list(robustez.keys())\n",
        "        r2_values = [res['R2'] for res in robustez.values()]\n",
        "\n",
        "        plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "        plt.bar(periodos, r2_values)\n",
        "        plt.title(f'R2 por Período - Modelo {modelo}')\n",
        "        plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "        plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "        plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Imprimir resultados detallados\n",
        "        for periodo, resultados in robustez.items():\n",
        "            print(f\"\\nPeríodo: {periodo}\")\n",
        "            print(f\"R2: {resultados['R2']:.4f}\")\n",
        "            print(\"Coeficientes:\")\n",
        "            print(resultados['Coeficientes'])\n",
        "\n",
        "    # 8. Comparación entre modelos\n",
        "    print(\"\\nComparando modelos...\")\n",
        "    comparacion = comparar_modelos(X, y, lambdas_opt)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Visualizar comparación\n",
        "    modelos = list(comparacion.keys())\n",
        "    r2_values = [res['R2'] for res in comparacion.values()]\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "    plt.bar(modelos, r2_values)\n",
        "    plt.title('Comparación de R2 entre Modelos')\n",
        "    plt.ylabel('R2')\n",
        "    plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Imprimir resultados detallados de la comparación\n",
        "    print(\"\\nResultados detallados de la comparación:\")\n",
        "    for modelo, resultados in comparacion.items():\n",
        "        print(f\"\\nModelo: {modelo}\")\n",
        "        print(f\"R2: {resultados['R2']:.4f}\")\n",
        "        print(\"Coeficientes:\")\n",
        "        print(resultados['Coeficientes'])\n",
        "\n",
        "if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n",
        "    main()\n",
        "\n"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "def visualizar_lambdas_optimos(X, y, n_splits=5):\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    Visualiza y compara los lambdas óptimos para cada modelo\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    # Diccionario para almacenar resultados\n",
        "    resultados = {}\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Modelos a evaluar\n",
        "    modelos = ['ridge', 'lasso', 'elastic_net']\n",
        "\n",
        "    for modelo in modelos:\n",
        "        print(f\"\\nAnálisis para {modelo.upper()}:\")\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Obtener resultados de validación cruzada\n",
        "        lambdas, cv_scores_mean, cv_scores_std = seleccionar_lambda(X, y, modelo, n_splits)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Encontrar lambda óptimo\n",
        "        lambda_opt = lambdas[np.argmin(cv_scores_mean)]\n",
        "        min_error = min(cv_scores_mean)\n",
        "\n",
        "        resultados[modelo] = {\n",
        "            'lambda_optimo': lambda_opt,\n",
        "            'error_cv': min_error\n",
        "        }\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Ajustar modelo con lambda óptimo\n",
        "        if modelo == 'ridge':\n",
        "            model = Ridge(alpha=lambda_opt)\n",
        "        elif modelo == 'lasso':\n",
        "            model = Lasso(alpha=lambda_opt)\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            model = ElasticNet(alpha=lambda_opt, l1_ratio=0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "        model.fit(X, y)\n",
        "        r2 = model.score(X, y)\n",
        "        resultados[modelo]['r2'] = r2\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Imprimir resultados\n",
        "        print(f\"Lambda óptimo: {lambda_opt:.6f}\")\n",
        "        print(f\"Error CV mínimo: {min_error:.6f}\")\n",
        "        print(f\"R² con lambda óptimo: {r2:.4f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Visualizar trayectoria de error CV\n",
        "        plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "        plt.semilogx(lambdas, cv_scores_mean)\n",
        "        plt.axvline(lambda_opt, color='r', linestyle='--', label='λ óptimo')\n",
        "        plt.fill_between(lambdas,\n",
        "                        np.array(cv_scores_mean) - np.array(cv_scores_std),\n",
        "                        np.array(cv_scores_mean) + np.array(cv_scores_std),\n",
        "                        alpha=0.2)\n",
        "        plt.xlabel('λ')\n",
        "        plt.ylabel('Error CV')\n",
        "        plt.title(f'Selección de λ para {modelo.upper()}')\n",
        "        plt.legend()\n",
        "        plt.grid(True)\n",
        "        plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Crear tabla comparativa\n",
        "    tabla_resultados = pd.DataFrame.from_dict(resultados, orient='index')\n",
        "    tabla_resultados.columns = ['Lambda Óptimo', 'Error CV', 'R²']\n",
        "    print(\"\\nTabla Comparativa de Modelos:\")\n",
        "    print(tabla_resultados)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Visualizar comparación de lambdas óptimos\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "    plt.bar(resultados.keys(), [res['lambda_optimo'] for res in resultados.values()])\n",
        "    plt.title('Comparación de Lambdas Óptimos')\n",
        "    plt.ylabel('Valor de λ')\n",
        "    plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "    plt.yscale('log')\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    return resultados\n",
        "\n",
        "# Ejemplo de uso:\n",
        "def main():\n",
        "    # Obtener datos\n",
        "    print(\"Descargando y preparando datos...\")\n",
        "    data = obtener_datos()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Preparar variables\n",
        "    X = data[['MKT', 'SMB', 'HML', 'MOM', 'VOL']]\n",
        "    y = data['Excess_Return']\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Estandarizar variables\n",
        "    scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "    X_scaled = pd.DataFrame(scaler.fit_transform(X), columns=X.columns, index=X.index)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Visualizar y comparar lambdas óptimos\n",
        "    resultados = visualizar_lambdas_optimos(X_scaled, y)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Análisis detallado del mejor modelo\n",
        "    mejor_modelo = min(resultados.items(), key=lambda x: x[1]['error_cv'])[0]\n",
        "    print(f\"\\nMejor modelo: {mejor_modelo.upper()}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Ajustar mejor modelo\n",
        "    lambda_opt = resultados[mejor_modelo]['lambda_optimo']\n",
        "    if mejor_modelo == 'ridge':\n",
        "        model = Ridge(alpha=lambda_opt)\n",
        "    elif mejor_modelo == 'lasso':\n",
        "        model = Lasso(alpha=lambda_opt)\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        model = ElasticNet(alpha=lambda_opt, l1_ratio=0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "    model.fit(X_scaled, y)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Mostrar coeficientes del mejor modelo\n",
        "    coef_df = pd.DataFrame({\n",
        "        'Variable': X.columns,\n",
        "        'Coeficiente': model.coef_\n",
        "    })\n",
        "    print(\"\\nCoeficientes del mejor modelo:\")\n",
        "    print(coef_df)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Visualizar coeficientes\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "    sns.barplot(x='Variable', y='Coeficiente', data=coef_df)\n",
        "    plt.title(f'Coeficientes del Mejor Modelo ({mejor_modelo.upper()})')\n",
        "    plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n",
        "    main()"
      ],
